disclaimer: These theories are speculative, unverified, or contradicted by mainstream physics. Presented for educational and research purposes only.

theories.name: Luminiferous Aether
theories.description: Proposed medium through which light propagates; disproved by Michelson-Morley experiment (1887)
theories.refutation: Michelson-Morley null result; special relativity made aether unnecessary
revival_theories: Quantum vacuum (ZPE) as modern aether analog

theories.name: Torsion Fields
theories.description: Hypothetical fields arising from spin of matter; claimed to propagate superluminally
theories.refutation: No reproducible experimental evidence; theoretical basis disputed

theories.name: Cold Fusion / LENR
theories.description: Nuclear fusion at near room temperature; controversial since Pons-Fleischmann announcement (1989)
theories.refutation: Results not reliably reproducible; US DOE review inconclusive (2004)
theories.active_research: LENR (Low Energy Nuclear Reactions) still studied by some mainstream labs

theories.name: Zero-Point Energy (ZPE) Extraction
theories.description: The quantum vacuum has non-zero ground state energy. Extraction as usable energy is disputed.
theories.mainstream_note: ZPE is real and observed (Casimir effect); large-scale extraction violates thermodynamics

theories.name: Tesla Free Energy / Radiant Energy
theories.description: Nikola Tesla claimed to tap atmospheric electrical energy for wireless power transmission
theories.historical_context: Wardenclyffe Tower project (1901) aimed at global wireless power; funding cut by J.P. Morgan
theories.modern_relevance: Modern resonant inductive coupling (WiTricity) partially validates wireless power transfer

theories.name: Electric Universe Theory
theories.description: Plasma and electromagnetic forces, not gravity, are the dominant forces shaping the universe
theories.refutation: Contradicts extensive gravitational observations; does not explain CMB, BBN, or large-scale structure

theories.name: Hollow Earth Physics
theories.description: The Earth is hollow with an interior sun; gravity works differently
theories.refutation: Seismic data clearly shows Earth's internal structure (crust, mantle, outer/inner core)

theories.name: Faster-Than-Light (FTL) Physics
theories.description: Mechanisms for effective FTL travel within or beyond general relativity

variants.name: Alcubierre warp drive
variants.note: Requires exotic matter with negative energy density

variants.name: Wormholes
variants.note: Topological shortcuts in spacetime; stability requires exotic matter

variants.name: Tachyons
variants.note: Hypothetical superluminal particles; would violate causality
